name: io.github.hugof1234/gilbert-mcp
description: Access your Gilbert meeting transcripts and summaries from Claude, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible clients. Search, list, and retrieve full transcripts in natural language.

environmentVariables.name: GILBERT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Gilbert API key (format: glbrt_live_...). Get one from your Gilbert admin dashboard with at least the meetings:read scope.

environmentVariables.name: GILBERT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Gilbert API base URL. Defaults to the official hosted API; override only for self-hosted deployments.
